name: Chugging
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Catapult, Change of Places Left to Right, Rolling Off the Arm, Shoulder Spin
following_figure_names: American Spin, Catapult, Change of Places Left to Right, Rolling Off the Arm, Shoulder Spin, Miami Special, Change of Hands Behind Back, Hip Bump, Stop and Go, Link
notes:
Chugging may be danced with double hand hold. Releasing both hands on step 17.
The rotation may vary, the size of the circle may vary.

steps.action: Step 1 2 of Link LR | No turn
Compact Chasse LRL | 1/8 to R over steps 3-4
comments: Retract R arm, increase tone in arm on step 5. (or dance side chassé). Man's L arm on Lady's Left shoulder.

steps.action: Very small side chassé RLR | 1/8 to L over steps 6-8
comments: Retain tone and slightly extend R arm. Man opens L arm to side.

steps.action: LF behind RF (Cuban Cross) to chassé LRL | 1/4 to R over steps 9-11
comments: (Lock chassé) Retain tone and slightly retract R arm. Man's L arm on Lady's Left shoulder.

steps.action: Very small side chassé RLR | 1/2 to L over steps 12-14
comments: Retain tone and slightly extend R arm. Man opens L arm to side.

steps.action: Cuban Cross to chassé LRL | 1/4 to R over steps 15-17
comments: (Lock chassé) Retain tone and slightly retract R arm. Turn Lady to R on step 17, release hold. Keep L arm to side, prepare to finish.

steps.action: Side chassé RLR. End in Open Position | 1/8 to L over steps 18-20
comments: This can be repeated. Lower arm to indicate chugging is ending. Regain L to R or R to R hand hold at end of lady's turn.
